name: AGV Kinematic Swept Path Analysis
description: A facility engineer must perform a kinematic swept path analysis for an Automated Guided Vehicle (AGV) navigating a curve to ensure adequate aisle width in a new warehouse layout. Programmatically animate a 2.0m x 1.0m x 0.5m AGV chassis in CoppeliaSim (ZMQ port 23000) executing a 90-degree counter-clockwise turn with a 3.0m turning radius centered at (0.0, 3.0, 0.0). The vehicle starts at (0.0, 0.0, 0.0) heading +X and ends at (3.0, 3.0, 0.0) heading +Y, maintaining tangency to the path. Record the world (X,Y) coordinates of the four corners during the maneuver and calculate the maximum outer radius, minimum inner radius, and total swept width. Export the corner trajectories to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/swept_corners.csv with columns for angle_deg, front_left_x, front_left_y, front_right_x, front_right_y, rear_left_x, rear_left_y, rear_right_x, and rear_right_y. Save a summary report to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/swept_report.json containing vehicle_length_m, vehicle_width_m, turn_radius_m, outer_radius_m, inner_radius_m, and swept_width_m.
